mapper.sql: bug.id, bug.created_time, bug.created_timestamp, bug.created_by, bug.modified_time, bug.modified_timestamp, bug.modified_by, bug.version, bug.status, bug.code, bug.name, bug.build_in_flag

bug.id, bug.created_time, bug.created_timestamp, bug.created_by, bug.created_id, bug.modified_time, bug.modified_timestamp, bug.modified_by, bug.modified_id, bug.deleted, bug.version, bug.remark, bug.status, bug.code, bug.name, bug.seq, bug.build_in_flag, bug.org_id
mapper.select:
select
, 0 as checked from user_group bug inner join `org` bo on bug.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} order by bug.name asc, bug.seq asc, bug.created_time asc

select
, 1 as checked from user_group bug inner join `org` bo on bug.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_group_user bugu on bug.id = bugu.user_group_id and bugu.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bugu.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bu.id = #{userId} order by bug.name asc, bug.seq asc

select
, 1 as checked from user_group bug inner join `org` bo on bug.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_group_role bugr on bug.id = bugr.user_group_id and bugr.deleted = 0 inner join `role` br on bugr.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 where bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and br.id = #{roleId} order by bug.name asc, bug.seq asc
